overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The character walks under elevated highways, crosses a street with yellow markings, and observes the cyberpunk skyline with towering buildings and smoke stacks. The time of day accelerates from afternoon sunlight to dusk and finally night, with neon signs becoming visible as darkness falls.

events.description: approaching yellow striped crosswalk at intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway toward the street intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with support pillars
gray concrete pedestrian walkway with visible seams and stains
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall palm trees lining the street visible between buildings
multi-story cyberpunk architecture with balconies and neon signage
green metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The concrete sidewalk runs alongside a graffiti-covered wall on the left, with palm trees and towering mixed-use buildings visible to the right. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the camera approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk at the intersection ahead.

events.description: stepping onto yellow striped crosswalk and crossing the street
looking up at tall building with smoke stacks while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while looking up at the cyberpunk skyline and smoke stacks

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
tall multi-tiered building with industrial elements and large video screens
tall chimneys emitting white smoke into the sky
curved on-ramp connecting to the main highway structure
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the wide yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street. Looking up reveals a stunning view of futuristic skyscrapers with industrial smoke stacks emitting plumes into the sky. A black futuristic vehicle drives through the intersection as the camera pans to take in the towering architecture and elevated highway ramps.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with graffiti walls under overpass

events.description: ambient light fading as dusk settles, building shadows lengthening

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and graffiti-covered walls as day transitions to evening

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall modern street light pole with dual lamps
multi-story building exterior with windows and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks back along the opposite sidewalk still under the overpass. The graffiti-covered walls continue on the left while the right side features a metal railing separating the walkway from the street. The lighting gradually shifts from bright afternoon sun to softer dusk tones as pedestrians pass by in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor under highway overpass transitioning to night

events.description: street lights and neon signs illuminating as darkness falls

agents.ego_description: continuing under the overpass as neon signs become visible and artificial lighting takes over

entered.detail: glowing neon signage on building facades including red and blue lights
large bright digital advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: Continuing the walk under the elevated highway as evening settles into night. The environment darkens significantly, with neon signs and digital billboards on the buildings becoming prominent light sources. The street lamps illuminate and vehicle headlights become more noticeable as the artificial lighting takes over from the fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway opening to sunset view

events.description: bright sunset light visible at the end of the overpass creating strong contrast

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright sunset light at the end of the covered walkway

entered.detail: bright golden sunlight streaming through the end of the overpass tunnel
tall buildings silhouetted against the bright sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the covered walkway, a brilliant sunset light shines through the opening ahead, creating a stark contrast with the dark overpass interior. The silhouettes of distant buildings frame the bright exit as the character walks toward the light. The scene transitions from the enclosed urban corridor to the open sky visible at the tunnel's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban corridor that transforms from a sunlit afternoon into a neon-lit night before ending in a brilliant sunset. It begins under a massive elevated highway overpass, moving past graffiti-covered walls and palm trees toward a yellow-striped crosswalk. As the camera crosses the multi-lane street, the view opens upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and industrial smoke stacks, while a futuristic vehicle glides through the intersection. The scene then shifts back to the sidewalk as the bright daylight softens into dusk, with the environment gradually darkening until vibrant neon signs and digital billboards ignite against the night sky. Finally, the camera moves toward the end of the covered walkway, where the dark interior gives way to a stark, glowing exit framed by the silhouettes of distant buildings under a radiant sunset.
